zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Wrottesley於1350年出生在英國薩默塞特易爾明斯特時，她的父親William de Wrottesley66歲，母親Joan de Bassett27歲。她於1366年與Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield在英國戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年7月27日在英國戴文享年62歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特易爾明斯特聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Wrottesley于1350年出生在英国薩默塞特易爾明斯特时，她的父亲William de Wrottesley66岁，母亲Joan de Bassett27岁。她于1366年与Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield在英国戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年7月27日在英国戴文享年62岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特易爾明斯特聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wrottesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wrottesley in Tettenhall (Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Wrottesley was born in 1350, in Ilminster, Somerset, England, her father, William de Wrottesley, was 66 and her mother, Joan de Bassett, was 27. She married Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield in 1366, in St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 27 July 1412, in Devon, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Wrottesley est née en 1350, à Ilminster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William de Wrottesley, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bassett, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield en 1366, à St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1412, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Wrottesley è nata il nel 1350 nel Ilminster, Somerset, England, sua padre, William de Wrottesley, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, Joan de Bassett, aveva 27 anni. ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, E: 영국 서머세트 이민스터 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Wrottesley(이)가 1350년 영국 서머세트 이민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Wrottesley(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Bassett(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1366년 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치에서 Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 7월 27일 영국 데폰에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 이민스터 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Wrottesley nasceu em 1350, em Ilminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Wrottesley, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Bassett, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield em 1366, em St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de julho de 1412, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, E: ст мэри'с чурч, илминстир, сомирсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Wrottesley родилась в 1350 г. в местности илминстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Wrottesley было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bassett, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield в 1366 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 июля 1412 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, илминстир, сомирсет, Англия.

Murió el 27 de julio de 1412, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary's Church, Ilminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
